subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and My handmaiden! We have hearkened unto thy call. the servant in attendance hath laid thy letter before the Face of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی ندایت را شنیدیم عبد حاضر نامه ات را امام وجه مظلوم عرض
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
